checks.title: Verify existence of implementation evidence
checks.description: Locate and confirm that documentary evidence of 'Regulatory Permission Governance' implementation exists in the evidence repository.
checks.command_parameters: Access the Board Secretariat or corporate secretarial records system. Retrieve Board and Risk Committee meeting minutes for the relevant period.
checks.expected_result: Evidence documents are present, dated within the verification period, and signed by the responsible owner.
checks.reasoning: Document existence is verifiable by an independent reviewer without requiring departmental cooperation.

checks.title: Assess Adequacy of Evidence Against Control Objective
checks.description: Review evidence content to confirm it adequately demonstrates compliance with the control objective for 'Regulatory Permission Governance'.
checks.command_parameters: Apply compliance review checklist. Document findings.
checks.expected_result: Board has discussed and minuted relevant regulatory agenda items. Risk oversight Committee meeting held at prescribed frequency. Quorum requirements met.
checks.reasoning: Adequacy assessment requires professional judgment from an independent reviewer.

checks.title: Auditor Sign-Off on Verification Outcome
checks.description: The reviewing auditor or compliance officer formally records the outcome of verification.
checks.command_parameters: Record findings in the compliance management system. Attach evidence references.
checks.expected_result: Verification outcome (PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL) recorded with auditor signature and timestamp.
checks.reasoning: Formal sign-off creates an immutable audit trail independent of the implementing department.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 3 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.title: Verify Database Encryption Status
checks.description: Query sys.databases to confirm Transparent Data Encryption is enabled on all production databases.
checks.command: SELECT name, is_encrypted FROM sys.databases WHERE is_encrypted = 0 AND name NOT IN ('master','tempdb','model','msdb');
checks.command_parameters: Run with READ access on target SQL Server instance. Zero rows = compliant.
checks.expected_result: Zero rows returned (all production databases encrypted).
checks.reasoning: is_encrypted is a binary flag in sys.databases — directly machine-readable.

checks.title: Verify Database Audit Specification is Active
checks.description: Confirm SQL Server Audit Specification is enabled and capturing relevant events.
checks.command: SELECT name, is_state_enabled FROM sys.server_audit_specifications WHERE is_state_enabled = 0;
checks.command_parameters: Run with VIEW SERVER STATE permission.
checks.expected_result: Zero rows returned (all audit specifications enabled).
checks.reasoning: Audit specification state is readable from system catalog.

checks.title: Verify Principle of Least Privilege — sysadmin Members
checks.description: List all accounts in the sysadmin fixed server role to detect over-privileged accounts.
checks.command: SELECT l.name, l.type_desc FROM sys.server_role_members rm JOIN sys.server_principals l ON rm.member_principal_id = l.principal_id WHERE rm.role_principal_id = SUSER_ID('sysadmin');
checks.command_parameters: Run with VIEW SERVER STATE permission. Review output against approved admin list.
checks.expected_result: Only authorised DBAs listed. No application service accounts in sysadmin role.
checks.reasoning: sysadmin membership is machine-queryable but compliance decision requires comparison against an approved list (manual step).

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 2 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.title: Query Active Accounts Without Verified KYC
checks.description: Run a database query to identify active customer accounts that lack verified KYC status.
checks.command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS non_compliant FROM customer_master WHERE kyc_status NOT IN ('VERIFIED','COMPLIANT') AND account_status = 'ACTIVE';
checks.command_parameters: Adapt column/table names to the institution's core banking schema. Run with READ-ONLY credentials on production replica.
checks.expected_result: COUNT = 0. Zero active accounts with non-compliant KYC status.
checks.reasoning: KYC status is stored in the core banking database and is queryable without involving the KYC team.

checks.title: Verify STR Filing Rate Within Threshold
checks.description: Confirm the volume of Suspicious Transaction Reports (STRs) filed in the period is consistent with prior periods and risk profile.
checks.verification_mechanism: FIU/IND Submission Portal or Transaction Monitoring System
checks.command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS strs_filed FROM str_register WHERE filing_date >= DATEADD(month,-3,GETDATE());
checks.command_parameters: Adapt to the institution's STR register table. Cross-reference with FIU-IND portal submissions.
checks.expected_result: STR count is non-zero and consistent with risk exposure. All filed STRs have FIU-IND acknowledgement.
checks.reasoning: STR filing count is queryable from the transaction monitoring or compliance system database.

checks.title: Review Sample Customer KYC Files
checks.description: Independently review a random sample of customer KYC files for completeness and authenticity.
checks.command_parameters: Select a random sample (minimum 30 records) using a random number generator. Access KYC documents in DMS.
checks.expected_result: All sampled records have: valid ID proof, address proof, photograph, risk categorisation, and periodic review date.
checks.reasoning: Document completeness requires human review of physical/digital documents. Sampling is independently controlled.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 2 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.title: Verify Database Encryption Status
checks.description: Query sys.databases to confirm Transparent Data Encryption is enabled on all production databases.
checks.command: SELECT name, is_encrypted FROM sys.databases WHERE is_encrypted = 0 AND name NOT IN ('master','tempdb','model','msdb');
checks.command_parameters: Run with READ access on target SQL Server instance. Zero rows = compliant.
checks.expected_result: Zero rows returned (all production databases encrypted).
checks.reasoning: is_encrypted is a binary flag in sys.databases — directly machine-readable.

checks.title: Verify Database Audit Specification is Active
checks.description: Confirm SQL Server Audit Specification is enabled and capturing relevant events.
checks.command: SELECT name, is_state_enabled FROM sys.server_audit_specifications WHERE is_state_enabled = 0;
checks.command_parameters: Run with VIEW SERVER STATE permission.
checks.expected_result: Zero rows returned (all audit specifications enabled).
checks.reasoning: Audit specification state is readable from system catalog.

checks.title: Verify Principle of Least Privilege — sysadmin Members
checks.description: List all accounts in the sysadmin fixed server role to detect over-privileged accounts.
checks.command: SELECT l.name, l.type_desc FROM sys.server_role_members rm JOIN sys.server_principals l ON rm.member_principal_id = l.principal_id WHERE rm.role_principal_id = SUSER_ID('sysadmin');
checks.command_parameters: Run with VIEW SERVER STATE permission. Review output against approved admin list.
checks.expected_result: Only authorised DBAs listed. No application service accounts in sysadmin role.
checks.reasoning: sysadmin membership is machine-queryable but compliance decision requires comparison against an approved list (manual step).

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 2 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.title: Verify Return Submission History via RBI Portal

checks.reasoning: Signatory approval is independently verifiable through the submission document itself.

checks.title: Query Target Registry Key Existence
checks.description: Verify the required registry key exists at the expected path.
checks.command: reg query "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System"
checks.command_parameters: Adapt the registry key path to the specific control. Run as Administrator.
checks.expected_result: Key exists and is accessible. Exit code 0.
checks.reasoning: Registry key existence is directly queryable. Exit code 0 = key exists.

checks.title: Verify Registry Value Meets Requirement
checks.description: Read the specific registry value and confirm it matches the required setting.
checks.command: reg query "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System" /v EnableLUA
checks.command_parameters: Replace the value name with the specific setting to verify. Expected: 0x1 (enabled).
checks.expected_result: EnableLUA = 0x1
checks.reasoning: Registry value content is machine-readable and directly comparable.

checks.title: Export Registry Hive as Evidence
checks.description: Export the relevant registry key to a .reg file for archival.
checks.command: reg export "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Policies\System" "RegistryEvidence.reg"
checks.command_parameters: Run as Administrator. Upload .reg file as evidence artefact.
checks.expected_result: .reg file created in working directory.
checks.reasoning: Registry export is a fully automated, single-command operation.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 3 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.command_parameters: Log in to RBI CIMS / regulatory submission portal. Retrieve submission history for the relevant return type and verify submission timestamps.
checks.expected_result: Evidence documents are present, dated within the verification period, and signed by the responsible owner.
checks.reasoning: Document existence is verifiable by an independent reviewer without requiring departmental cooperation.

checks.title: Assess Adequacy of Evidence Against Control Objective
checks.description: Review evidence content to confirm it adequately demonstrates compliance with the control objective for 'Regulatory Best Practice Advisory'.
checks.command_parameters: Apply compliance review checklist. Document findings.
checks.expected_result: All regulatory returns submitted within stipulated timelines. Submission acknowledgements present. No outstanding or overdue returns.
checks.reasoning: Adequacy assessment requires professional judgment from an independent reviewer.

checks.title: Auditor Sign-Off on Verification Outcome
checks.description: The reviewing auditor or compliance officer formally records the outcome of verification.
checks.command_parameters: Record findings in the compliance management system. Attach evidence references.
checks.expected_result: Verification outcome (PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL) recorded with auditor signature and timestamp.
checks.reasoning: Formal sign-off creates an immutable audit trail independent of the implementing department.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 3 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.title: Verify Return Submission History via RBI Portal
checks.description: Log in to the RBI CIMS / regulatory submission portal and retrieve the submission history for the applicable return type and period.
checks.command_parameters: Navigate to rbi.org.in → CIMS login → Submission History. Filter by return type and period.
checks.expected_result: All returns for the verification period show status 'Submitted' or 'Accepted'. No overdue or missing submissions.
checks.reasoning: Submission status is independently verifiable via the RBI portal without asking the submitting department.

checks.title: Verify Submission Acknowledgement Receipt on File
checks.description: Confirm the institution holds the RBI/regulator acknowledgement receipt for each submitted return.
checks.command_parameters: Access the document management system or shared drive. Locate acknowledgement receipts for each return.
checks.expected_result: Acknowledgement receipts present for all submissions within the review period. Receipts match submission dates on portal.
checks.reasoning: Acknowledgement receipts are documentary evidence independent of the submitting team.

checks.title: Verify Authorised Signatory Approval on Submitted Return
checks.description: Confirm submitted returns were approved by an authorised signatory before submission.
checks.command_parameters: Review the submitted return documents for authorised signatory signature or digital approval trail.
checks.expected_result: Sign-off from MD/CEO/Principal Officer visible on submitted return.
checks.reasoning: Signatory approval is independently verifiable through the submission document itself.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 3 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.command_parameters: Apply compliance review checklist. Document findings.
checks.expected_result: All regulatory returns submitted within stipulated timelines. Submission acknowledgements present. No outstanding or overdue returns.
checks.reasoning: Adequacy assessment requires professional judgment from an independent reviewer.

checks.title: Auditor Sign-Off on Verification Outcome
checks.description: The reviewing auditor or compliance officer formally records the outcome of verification.
checks.command_parameters: Record findings in the compliance management system. Attach evidence references.
checks.expected_result: Verification outcome (PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL) recorded with auditor signature and timestamp.
checks.reasoning: Formal sign-off creates an immutable audit trail independent of the implementing department.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 3 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.title: Verify Return Submission History via RBI Portal
checks.description: Log in to the RBI CIMS / regulatory submission portal and retrieve the submission history for the applicable return type and period.
checks.command_parameters: Navigate to rbi.org.in → CIMS login → Submission History. Filter by return type and period.
checks.expected_result: All returns for the verification period show status 'Submitted' or 'Accepted'. No overdue or missing submissions.
checks.reasoning: Submission status is independently verifiable via the RBI portal without asking the submitting department.

checks.title: Verify Submission Acknowledgement Receipt on File
checks.description: Confirm the institution holds the RBI/regulator acknowledgement receipt for each submitted return.
checks.command_parameters: Access the document management system or shared drive. Locate acknowledgement receipts for each return.
checks.expected_result: Acknowledgement receipts present for all submissions within the review period. Receipts match submission dates on portal.
checks.reasoning: Acknowledgement receipts are documentary evidence independent of the submitting team.

checks.title: Verify Authorised Signatory Approval on Submitted Return
checks.description: Confirm submitted returns were approved by an authorised signatory before submission.
checks.command_parameters: Review the submitted return documents for authorised signatory signature or digital approval trail.
checks.expected_result: Sign-off from MD/CEO/Principal Officer visible on submitted return.
checks.reasoning: Signatory approval is independently verifiable through the submission document itself.

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 3 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.

checks.title: Verify Database Encryption Status
checks.description: Query sys.databases to confirm Transparent Data Encryption is enabled on all production databases.
checks.command: SELECT name, is_encrypted FROM sys.databases WHERE is_encrypted = 0 AND name NOT IN ('master','tempdb','model','msdb');
checks.command_parameters: Run with READ access on target SQL Server instance. Zero rows = compliant.
checks.expected_result: Zero rows returned (all production databases encrypted).
checks.reasoning: is_encrypted is a binary flag in sys.databases — directly machine-readable.

checks.title: Verify Database Audit Specification is Active
checks.description: Confirm SQL Server Audit Specification is enabled and capturing relevant events.
checks.command: SELECT name, is_state_enabled FROM sys.server_audit_specifications WHERE is_state_enabled = 0;
checks.command_parameters: Run with VIEW SERVER STATE permission.
checks.expected_result: Zero rows returned (all audit specifications enabled).
checks.reasoning: Audit specification state is readable from system catalog.

checks.title: Verify Principle of Least Privilege — sysadmin Members
checks.description: List all accounts in the sysadmin fixed server role to detect over-privileged accounts.
checks.command: SELECT l.name, l.type_desc FROM sys.server_role_members rm JOIN sys.server_principals l ON rm.member_principal_id = l.principal_id WHERE rm.role_principal_id = SUSER_ID('sysadmin');
checks.command_parameters: Run with VIEW SERVER STATE permission. Review output against approved admin list.
checks.expected_result: Only authorised DBAs listed. No application service accounts in sysadmin role.
checks.reasoning: sysadmin membership is machine-queryable but compliance decision requires comparison against an approved list (manual step).

verification_plans.final_decision_rule: PASS if all 2 mandatory checks produce PASS result. FAIL if any BLOCKER check fails. PARTIAL if only MINOR checks fail.
